landingPage.faq1Question: How do I get access after payment?
landingPage.faq1Answer: After payment, you'll receive an email with instructions to sign in to your Premium account.
landingPage.faq2Answer: Sometimes the confirmation email can fail to arrive or end up in your spam folder—check there first. If it's nowhere to be found, go to the "Forgot license" page and request it to be sent again using the email address you used for payment.
landingPage.faq3Answer:
We accept credit/debit cards and PayPal.
We also accept cryptocurrency payments.

Look for the credit card / crypto icon in the payment dialog.
landingPage.faq4Answer:
Yes, you can cancel your subscription anytime.
For subscriptions through external platforms, cancel directly on their platform.
One-time purchases don't need cancellation.
landingPage.faq5Answer:
You'll keep Premium access until the end of your paid period.

After your subscription ends, your account will be left in a read-only state.
landingPage.faq6Question: Is the lifetime access really forever?
landingPage.faq6Answer: Yes! Lifetime means you get permanent access to Premium features for as long as {name} exists.

Sort adult images and XXX videos by rating, date, or popularity to find the newest and best-rated uploads.
